content.en:
The Star Wing Six-Arm Shield is a small shield with six sides, but this is only its initial appearance, once the two forms are activated, the appearance will naturally change drastically.

In an instant, this star-winged six-armed shield was integrated into the sleeve of the garan's robe, surrounding the sleeve and becoming an arm shield.

Death Void.

Ye Tian was going to test the effect of the Star Wing Six-Arm Shield here.

I saw Ye Tian's other copy body attacking with all his might, simply using extradimensional power to attack.

Relying on the extra-dimensional power of fusing extra-dimensional things, and it is not a super-dimensional technique, the attack power is limited, but it is not something that normal ordinary peak realm gods can compete with.

Rumble!!!!

The power of the extradimensional turned into light and killed.

In an instant, Ye Tian urged the six-armed shield of star wings on his arm.

In an instant, the Starwinged Six-Armed Shield opened its first form.

I saw that the six-armed shield of the star wings turned into a huge spherical shield, enveloping the whole body.

The extradimensional power attacked the Star Wing Six-Arm Shield, only knocking the Star Wing Six-Arm Shield and Ye Tian away, but it did not hurt Ye Tian.

"What a strong defense!"

Ye Tian was very satisfied.

It is worthy of being a complete super-dimensional secret treasure, even if it is a low-level super-dimensional secret treasure, its value is also above the boundless sailing ship of the gods of the Sumeru realm.

However, after Ye Tian 033 attacked many times in a row, he still broke through the Super Dimensional Secret Treasure.

Obviously, although the Super Secret Treasure Star Wing Six-Arm Shield is very powerful, it can't defend all the time, and it still has a defensive limit.

Next, Ye Tian tested the second form of the Star Wing Six-Arm Shield.

Wow!!!!

The six-armed shield of the star wings was urged by a thought, appeared on the back, and gradually condensed a pair of wings.

Immediately after, Ye Tian's speed soared many times.

Swish!

He turned into a ray of light and traveled through the void of death.

Of course, he is shuttling in the safe area of his own exploration, otherwise he is really in danger, and it is a small matter to copy the fall of the body, and it would be a pity to lose the six-armed shield of the star wings!

After the test, Ye Tian returned to the Terran Endless Kingdom Alliance at the Eternal Realm.

......

Refining the Star Wing Six-Arm Shield is just the beginning, he can also refine more super dimensional secret treasures in the future, as long as he gathers the materials, he can refine them.

However, he did not prepare a super secret treasure for his relatives, not reluctantly.

But for their relatives, there is no point in giving them the Super Secret Treasure at the moment.

If he couldn't activate the power of the super dimension, he wouldn't be able to exert the power of the super dimensional secret treasure at all, and his relatives didn't need to enter the death void, nor did they need to face the threat of the supreme force, or he needed the super dimensional secret treasure even more.

Another period of time has passed.

Ye Tian gathered the materials needed for another super dimensional secret treasure, and the super dimensional secret treasure he needed to refine this time was the Ice Orchid Pearl, this super dimensional secret treasure is a super dimensional secret treasure for auxiliary healing, which can make the body recover at a very fast speed when injured.

With the Ice Orchid Pearl, the ability to save life naturally soars.

Then, another period of time passed, and Ye Tian refined the third super dimensional secret treasure - the Flawless Pupil, this super dimensional secret treasure is used for snooping, insight and auxiliary combat, which can improve his perception to a very terrifying level, and if other peak realm gods hide and spy on him, he can also use this flawless pupil to instantly gain insight into the other party's location.

Although the copying talent can also be used to spy around, if the super-dimensional secret treasure is used to hide, the copying talent cannot break through the hidden power of the super-dimensional power, and the flawless pupil is also of great use to him.

After refining these three Secret Treasures, plus the Garan Treasure Clothes, he now has four complete Secret Treasures.

However.

Ye Tian still felt that it was not enough, he was also ready to refine more super dimensional secret treasures, but the materials of other super dimensional secret treasures were extremely rare, and there seemed to be no few of them in this area.

"Then superimpose the Super Dimensional Secret Treasure, such as the Star Wing Six-Arm Shield, the material of this Super Dimensional Secret Treasure is slightly easier to find, then refine a few more Star Wing Six-Arm Shield!"

Ye Tian decided. []

So, in the following days, Ye Tian focused on finding materials for the Star Wing Six-Arm Shield.

In the next few hundred billion to Dao Era years, Ye Tian finally refined two more Star Wing Six-Arm Shields, and also refined one more Ice Orchid Pearl.

Not only that, but he also found a lot of resources that helped refine the Eternal Dao Seed and helped condense the Eternal Realm Spirits, which was enough for the human race to cultivate more high-level realm gods and even peak realm gods.

......

Six trillion solstice years have passed.

For such a long time, the human race has given birth to a large number of high-level realm gods, and the cultivation of Ye Tian's wives and children has also been promoted to high-level peak realm gods, condensing nine eternal realm spirits.

Not only that, but there are also several high-level realm gods, and they have also condensed nine eternal realm spirits, but the foundation is insufficient, and the cultivation is only a high-level eternal Dao species, and their combat effectiveness is average, which belongs to the normal high-level peak realm god combat power.

As for Ye Tian himself, after using many extra-dimensional resources, the Eternal Dao Seed was already very close to the limit of the high-level peak realm god, and once he reached the limit, he would immediately impact the peak realm god cultivation.

Over the years, he has found a lot of materials, and he has refined a lot of super secret treasures.

Moreover, each of his replica bodies is fused with an extra-dimensional thing, and each extra-dimensional thing is different, and the extra-dimensional techniques of the meeting are also different.

Of course, it's not that he doesn't want to fuse some extra-dimensional things, but the fusion of a replica body with an extra-dimensional thing is almost the limit, and if he wants to fuse a second extra-dimensional thing, it is too easy to cause conflicts, thus making the body explode.

Therefore, he did not fuse with a second extradimensional object.

However, he also had some understanding, and when his cultivation was raised to the peak realm god level, he might have the hope of fusing a second extradimensional thing.

In short, compared to when he first entered the Garanbao ship, his current combat effectiveness has improved a lot.

And the ability to save lives has been drastically improved.

But now, there is also a troublesome problem.

He knew that he seemed to be being targeted by the supreme forces, and there was more than one.

......

Taihao Tianzhu Palace.

The Yonghao Realm God, the Sumeru Realm God, and other peak realm gods are all here.

At this time, the Yonghao Realm God who was the leader spoke: "Everyone, there is still a lot of time before the last arrival of the Jialanbao Ship, but we still haven't found many resources now, even if I am willing to take out the extradimensional resources stored in the Taihao Heavenly Chaos Palace, I can't buy a few places to follow the ship." Moreover, when the time comes, a place with the ship will be absolutely valuable. However, after many discussions, we can allocate 30% of our resources to you, but the rest is up to you. "

The Sumeru Realm God said at this time: "Yonghao Realm Gods, all the Realm Gods, you definitely can't get too many resources by relying on conventional means, it's time to find a way to grab some resources." "

"Could it be a war with the Demon Seed Abyss, but this is not something that our family can decide!" said a peak realm god, shaking his head.

"No, as far as I know, the Terran Ye Heavenly Realm God has cultivated a large number of high-level realm gods over the years, and a lot of resources have been spent on them, and he definitely has a lot of extradimensional resources on him. The god of the Sumeru realm said.
